Autonomous question router · v60

Ask once.
Open the right proof path.

Ask GoalOS answers public-site questions locally in the browser and routes visitors to the right proof page, console, evidence room, legal boundary, or complete route index. It is not a server chatbot and it does not send questions anywhere.

Open full question console →See all 66 routesRead the proof institution

No account. No form submission. No wallet. No token approval. No network request. No analytics. No cookies. No browser storage. No user data retained. No production authority.

AskGoalOS
66public routes
0network calls
0stored questions
1route engine

Live local answer engine

Type a question. GoalOS routes the next click.

Best-practice boundary

Answers are local. Routing is explicit.

The assistant answers from the static route manifest and local doctrine cards. It can open a route when a visitor asks to “open,” “go to,” or “show” a page. Otherwise it explains and presents recommended links.

Proof institution fit

Questions become navigation receipts, not user records.

The page demonstrates the same principle as GoalOS itself: make intent legible, route to proof, preserve boundaries, and avoid collecting private data when public guidance is enough.

© MontrealAI · browser-local public-safe demos · no wallet · no network request from demos · no user data wanted · Privacy · Terms · Legal · AGIALPHA Boundary
